title: Remove assignments with strengths weaker than strongest non-tristate RHS

features.name: assign drive strength specification with weak0 supply1
features.description: Code should include an assign statement with explicit drive strength specification using weak0 and supply1 strengths

features.name: conditional assignment with tristate
features.description: Code should include an assign statement with a conditional ternary expression where the false branch is tristate 'z'

features.name: multiple strength-assigned drivers on same wire with conditional tristate
features.description: Code should include two assign statements to the same wire where one has drive strength specification and the other uses a conditional expression with tristate
